entry.data:
SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
SOUTHEAST WINDS AROUND 10 MPH

CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
NOT AS COOL WITH LOWS IN THE MID 50S
SOUTHEAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH, INCREASING TO SOUTH 15 TO 20 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 30 MPH AFTER MIDNIGHT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
SHOWERS LIKELY IN THE AFTERNOON
WINDY WITH HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
SOUTH WINDS 20 TO 30 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 45 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

RAIN AND SNOW SHOWERS IN THE EVENING
LITTLE OR NO SNOW ACCUMULATION
BREEZY AND MUCH COOLER WITH LOWS IN THE MID 20S
WEST WINDS 20 TO 25 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 45 MPH
CHANCE OF PRECIPITATION 90 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE MORNING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY SUNNY
BLUSTERY AND MUCH COOLER WITH HIGHS IN THE LOWER 30S
NORTHWEST WINDS 20 TO 25 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 40 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS AROUND 15
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 30S

MOSTLY CLOUDY AND NOT AS COOL
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE IN THE MID 30S

PARTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 60S
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 40S
